title: Italian Fish Broth
description: A light and flavorful fish broth made with Italian herbs and spices.

ingredients.name: Fish bones
ingredients.notes: white fish bones or a combination of white and dark fish bones

ingredients.name: Revitalizing broth
ingredients.notes: you can use store-bought broth or make your own

ingredients.name: Italian seasoning
ingredients.notes: dried herbs such as basil, oregano, and thyme

instructions: 1. In a large pot, combine fish bones and revitalizing broth. Bring to a boil over high heat.
2. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
3. Add Ukrainian-style cabbage and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
4. Stir in chopped parsley and minced garlic.
6. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
8. Enjoy with a side of crusty bread or a green salad.
